mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(case when expiration_time < now() or status = 3 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as expiredBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when expiration_time < now() or status = 3 then greatest(stock_quantity - locked_quantity - sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end), 0) as expiredStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when expiration_time >= now() and expiration_time < date_add(now(), interval 3 day) and status != 2 and greatest(stock_quantity - locked_quantity - sold_quantity, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as expiringSoonBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when expiration_time >= now() and expiration_time < date_add(now(), interval 3 day) and status != 2 then greatest(stock_quantity - locked_quantity - sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end), 0) as expiringSoonStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when status = 2 or stock_quantity <= sold_quantity then 1 else 0 end), 0) as soldOutBatchCount from inventory_batch
